step_rationale: Extracellular-matrix structural protein; altered in atherosclerotic plaque remodeling.
mechanism: Thrombospondin-4 is an ECM protein dysregulated in atherosclerotic plaque progression and fibrous-cap remodeling.

references.title: Clinically significant novel biomarkers for prediction of first ever myocardial infarction: the Tromsø Study.
Plasma proteome profiling of atherosclerotic disease manifestations reveals elevated levels of the cytoskeletal protein vinculin.
